results.notes: Extremely well-audited in early 2026. Core components (MCPs, attachments, sandbox) have been heavily targeted. Only highly novel or specific node bypasses are likely to be accepted.

Highly competitive on Huntr. CVE-2025-3248 is a known exploited vulnerability (KEV). Version 1.9.0 fixed multiple critical RCE/file-write vectors. New submissions must look deeper into logic flaws rather than direct input execution.

existing_cves: Unassigned Huntr Report (RCE in RPC Server)
results.notes: While many reports exist, the project is newer and has a large attack surface in its specialized document parsers and crawling logic. Opportunities remain in less common file formats and tool-specific SQL injection.
